socketserver/ThreadingMixIn/max_children.name: max_children
socketserver/ThreadingMixIn/max_children.description: Specify how many child processes will exist to handle requests at a time for ForkingMixIn. If the limit is reached, new requests will wait until one child process has finished.

info.excerpt: Specify how many child processes will exist to handle requests at a time for ForkingMixIn. If the limit is reached, new requests will wait until one child process has finished.
